descripcion: KISSTORY MARBELLA Pack your swimsuits and get your beds & tickets booked, we’re back with what is “Officially Marbella’s BIGGEST day party this Summer, KISSTORY 🙌 💦 We’ll be hitting Marbella with our EXCLUSIVE residency at NAÔ Pool Club from the 3th May until the 25th September! Expect the biggest Old Skool & anthems as we take you on a musical journey each and every week. Bringing you epic vibes & the best music make sure you book in and get set to party with your fave KISSTORY DJs, residents & special guests! KISSTORY returns for Summer 2025! We look forward to welcoming you!

Discover Malaga's nightlife like a local (but with a lot more fun)!
Pub crawls are the perfect opportunity to explore the city's most vibrant side: the one that lights up when the sun goes down. Together with an international group of travelers and guides, you'll discover the best bars and clubs in the heart of the historic center, amid music, laughter, and toasts that can't be counted out.

During the evening you will visit two bars and two clubs, where you can dance until late, experience the authentic atmosphere of Malaga nightlife, and enjoy drinks with friends. Each stop is designed to make you feel part of the party, with included drinks and shots that will make the experience even more memorable.

More than just a pub crawl, this pub crawl is a social experience: you'll meet people from all over the world, with whom you can share stories, dances, and maybe a new friendship. Whether you're traveling alone or in a group, you'll find a welcoming, energetic environment that's always ready to entertain you.

**Sundays Session** is the daytime party that makes Sundays shine at **Ocean’s**, right by the Mediterranean Sea. House music from noon, sunshine on your skin, and the endless blue as the backdrop. The vibe is fresh, fun, and full of good energy. You dance, toast, and enjoy without rushing. **Sundays Session** is daytime, music, and pure happiness by the sea.

Taking the Balearics by storm, experience the ultimate fusion of house music, exceptional entertainment and out-of-this-world production as HOUSE In Paradise, Ibiza’s number one pool party, lands at the iconic Oceans Calvia Beach, Mallorca! Every Sunday, immerse yourself in the electrifying energy and party from day to night amidst the stunning backdrop of Majorca's picturesque shores. 
  
Join us for an unforgettable journey, in this brand new residency where the spirit of the Mediterranean creates a haven for dance enthusiasts and paradise seekers alike in the clubbing capital, Mallorca. Discover a world unknown as you are transported to new depths and be amazed at Oceans transformation into an underwater utopia. HOUSE guarantees to be nothing short of surprises as previous guests have included Camelphat, David Penn, Ed Sheeran and 2023 saw Irish legends Belters Only smash it out of the water.  
  
Guaranteed Sundays will be filled with unparalleled euphoria and pure hedonistic delight. Don't miss your chance to be part of this extraordinary event as HOUSE In Paradise takes residence at Oceans Mallorca, igniting Sunday’s each week. Savor the vibrant atmosphere, and revel in the magic of HOUSE In Paradise as it unfolds this summer!

All summer dominions, Oceans Beach Club Magaluf comes on at night. Music, energy, moonlight and summer vibes in a single night. Once on the ground, the party and the night began with rites, lights and unforgettable moments.

This summer, Modern Funktion makes its long-awaited Ibiza debut, landing at the island’s most distinctive daytime venue.
Set against the backdrop of 528, one of Ibiza’s most unique and authentic open-air spaces, the event
promises a true daytime experience that blends music, atmosphere, and community.

CHEAT ON HOUSE AND TECHNO FOR A DAY.

R&B Affair is the one you sneak off for. A pool party sound tracked by the finest R&B slow jams, big hooks and throwback anthems. The kind of tunes you feel as much as you sing – hands in the air, sun on your skin, no rush to be anywhere else.

Nostalgic, a little naughty, and dangerously easy to get carried away. Consider this your permission to cheat. We won’t tell if you don’t…

More than 400 m2 of outdoor and indoor space with a fine selection of gastronomy, cocktails and selected background music. You can enjoy the finest Valencian cuisine with local products and 360º views.

NOT LIKE US is not an event, it is a statement. A selective community, a mindset, a luxury urban lifestyle for those who set the standard rather than follow it. This is not about parties, but about belonging, influence, and taste. We move differently, we dress differently, we consume differently — selective, confident, unapologetic. The experience is driven by a curated selection of Hip-Hop, RnB, Trap, Afrobeat and Amapiano, set within a Luxury Pool Glam, urban-chic dress code. Bold, confident and aspirational in energy, every detail reinforces one message: Not Like Us, exclusively at Mogli The Key.

Guests must be 21 years or older. Valid government-issued ID required.
Dress code: No sportswear or themed accessories.

Bedouin return to Ibiza for the 8th year of their iconic residency SAGA, opening a powerful new chapter at Chinois Ibiza. Running every Sunday from June 21st through October 11th, SAGA returns following a standout summer that saw the duo reach new creative heights.
SAGA continues its evolution at Chinois since its inception in 2017, which continues to remain in Ibiza’s cultural fabric. The historic venue is based in the nomadic-spirited club in the heart of Ibiza’s Marina, located inside the Ibiza Gran Hotel. Bedouin and Chinois are united by a commitment to diversity, connection, and community, delivered through immersive sound, sensual visuals, and a deeply human dancefloor experience.
Fresh off winning the 2025 Vicious Awards for Best House Party in Ibiza, Bedouin’s SAGA stands as one of the island’s most revered and enduring residencies. Their celebrated SAGA Ibiza season in 2025 went from strength to strength all season, reinforcing the project’s reputation as a global gathering point for music lovers from every corner of the world.
The 2026 SAGA theme, Garden of Illusions, resembles not only as a party series, but as a living mythology that unfolds over the course of a season. A garden traditionally represents growth, harmony, and paradise, yet illusion introduces instability where things are not as they seem. In this space, Bedouin invites the audience into dreamlike worlds where reality bends and time dissolves. This mirrors their musical language: house rhythms grounded in ancient Middle Eastern and North African influences, yet reshaped through modern electronic expression.
White not?

Domingos de tardeo con alma de club.
Latin Tech en su punto: percusiones con acento, electrónica cálida y una terraza rodeada de naturaleza que pide ser bailada desde el atardecer hasta que cae la noche.
Nuestros DJs residentes te harán disfrutar de los domingos como nunca lo habías hecho. Respira. Baila. Repite.

————

Sunday with a club soul.
Latin tech just right: percussion with an accent, warm electronic beats, and a terrace surrounded by nature that begs to be danced on — from sunset until night falls.
Our resident DJs will make you enjoy Sundays like never before.
Breathe. Dance. Repeat.

Solomun+1, one of the most influential residencies in Ibiza, takes over Sundays at Pacha Ibiza from May 31 to October 4. Since 2013, Solomun has brought different generations together through marathon sets, constantly evolving new music and by moving the booth to the centre of the room, creating a new closeness to the dancefloor — all under one message: Nobody Is Not Loved. Each Sunday, his +1 concept sees him share the decks with just one guest, a singular Ibiza experience that defines the lasting bond between Solomun, Pacha Ibiza and the island.

nombre: ZONA LOUNGE & POOL EN PINEDO BEACH
descripcion:
Disfrute del ambiente de los fines de semana en nuestra "Zona Lounge & Pool", acompañado de la mejor selección de House y Afro House, de la mano de los mejores Djs en directo. Reserve su cama balinesa, cama huevo o Zona VIP y viva una experiencia única en uno de los "Pools Clubs" más exclusivos de Valencia. La "Zona Lounge & Pool" abre a las 12:30h, así que venga y disfrute del verano 2026 en Pinedo Beach.

Le recordamos que también contamos con "Arrocería Pinedo Beach", situada al otro lado de la piscina. Este espacio abre exclusivamente a mediodía y es el lugar ideal para degustar una auténtica paella o uno de nuestros arroces. Si desea comer en nuestra arrocería, deberá realizar su reserva a través de nuestra web.

Todo nuestro complejo ha sido recomendado nuevamente por la Guía MICHELIN 2026, que destaca tanto la calidad de nuestros arroces y paellas como el entorno paradisíaco del complejo, con piscina y una elegante Zona Lounge con música, perfecta para disfrutar de una copa antes o después de comer.
